name: Sessy
tagline: Email observability platform for monitoring and analyzing email systems.
description:
Email observability platform for monitoring and analyzing email systems.

Docs: https://github.com/marckohlbrugge/sessy/blob/main/docs/docker-deployment.md?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  sessy:
    image: ghcr.io/marckohlbrugge/sessy:main
    environment:
      - SECRET_KEY_BASE=4df4c8f7e8515cc65180957ccf0653f5
      - HTTP_AUTH_USERNAME=ub773a879c1
      - HTTP_AUTH_PASSWORD=e99222aa07cca060a3dcef97800908e2
    volumes:
      - sessy-data:/rails/storage
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:80 || [ $? -eq 22 ]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42108:80
volumes:
  sessy-data: null
